pi_items.metadata_value: Create custom SCA policy with 3+ checks, configure Wazuh, write compliance gap analysis report
pi_items.verified_value: Create custom SCA policy with 3+ checks, configure Wazuh, write compliance gap analysis report

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a custom Wazuh SCA policy YAML file with at least 3 checks, configuring the Wazuh manager's ossec.conf to reference this custom policy, and writing a compliance gap analysis report of at least 500 characters to /home/ga/Desktop/compliance_report.txt. The environment uses real container OS configurations for the Security Configuration Assessment.
